title: AUDIENCE-ASK — sunset walk, where is Ginger's island?
prompt: Wide cinematic golden-hour shot on @beach-sunset — golden light pouring across the wet sand, the sun half-set on the horizon, soft pastel pinks and oranges. Three figures already walking along the wet shore in foreground silhouette: @Papa in the CENTER holding @Sara's hand on his RIGHT and @Eva's hand on his LEFT. They walk slowly, the gentle surf lapping at their feet. Sara (looking out at the sunset, then turning her head DIRECTLY toward camera): "Where do YOU think Ginger's island is?" Eva (also turning her face toward camera, both girls eyes gleaming in golden light): "Is it FAR? Is it CLOSE?" Papa (quietly to himself, looking out): "Wherever it is — we'll find it."
